creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Hello!

Tuesday, December 19, 2006, 3:01:26 PM, you wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/heirloom-mailx,

> Please note that PR ports/106893 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106893

 I approve this patch.

--
Best regards,
 Alexander
